full_text:
Xu Qiu (Mengyu) 徐璆 (孟玉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Qiu (徐璆), styledMengyu (孟玉), was born in Guangling. A scholarly man of utmost honesty, he refused to serve Yuan Shu and returned the imperial seal. Xu Qiu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom.
